visual_description: A young boy with light brown hair, wearing a striped sweater, stands in a dimly lit room holding a large knife in his right hand and a small object in his left. He turns his head slightly to his left, looking toward a television set, while the warm glow of a lamp illuminates part of the room. The room contains vintage furniture, curtains, and a cluttered table with various items, with the boy positioned near the center of the frame.
